meta.name: Spatial point patterns (Ripley's L)
meta.description: Test whether each region's spots are clustered or dispersed across space with Ripley's L statistic.
meta.provenance: Adapted from the squidpy 'Ripley' vignette; targets the visium_hne example.

readme: Runs Ripley's L statistic on `obs['cluster']` (builds its own neighborhood internally) and plots the per-region curves.

params.name: cluster_key
params.tooltip: obs column holding the region/cluster labels
